rulings.Case Title: FARHAD ZAGHI VS. CECELIA KENNEDY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Continue Stewart Title Of California Inc'S Motion For Summary Judgment/Adjudication Added To Calendar Per The Orders Of Judge R. Ulmer. Parties Waive Notice In Open Court. Motion Must Be Filed And Submitted By Oct-19-15.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 8. Motion To Continue Stewart Title Of California Inc'S Motion For Summary Judgment/Adjudication GRANTED. Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to December 16, 2015. Briefing schedule in accordance with the new hearing date. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MICHAEL SHUEY VS. KARIN L ANDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFF GEORGE SHUEY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction DENIED, moot. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ROBIN WILSON VS. JUDITH A BOLTER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF ROBIN WILSON MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. California "trial courts are to liberally permit" amendment of complaints. Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal. App. 3d 486, 488-89. And three months is adequate time to conclude discovery in a case of this kind. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: FERDINAND A. POSAS VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, A UTAH CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC., NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts showing that the application was complete (CC 2923.6(h)) and to allege damages; demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts re: unlawful/unfair/fraudulent prongs. Demurer is otherwise overruled. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE YOUNGS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL (PROVIDED ACCESS)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT granted with leave to amend to address all issues raised by motion to strike. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE YOUNGS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL (PROVIDED ACCESS)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ULYSSES MOORING-GUARD et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY Motion For Entry Of Judgment Hearing Required. Parties to be prepared to set a mediation date with the Honorable Richard Ulmer. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: AMANDA ESTELLE ARCHULETA VS. HOLLY GONGOB ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Compel Defts' Responses, Without Objection, To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories-General, Set One, Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One, And Requests For Proudction Of Documents, Set One; 2) Deem Admissions; And 3) Request For Monetary And Terminating Sanctionsagianst Defts; Memo Of P&A; And Decl Of Arthur Meirson In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 7. PLAINTIFF AMANDA ARCHULETA MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To: 1) Compel Defts' Responses, Without Objection, To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories-General, Set One, Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer, Set One, And Requests For Proudction Of Documents, Set One; 2) Deem Admissions; And 3) Request For Monetary And Terminating Sanctionsagianst Defts; Memo Of P&A; And Decl Of Arthur Meirson In Support Thereof GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 1819 GOLDEN GATE I1, LLC VS. CRAIG CASWELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 21, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT CRAIG CASWELL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled, 5 days to answer. Notice is based in nuisance, which is described as hoarding of leaking jars. CCP 1161(4) allows for a termination of tenancy based on nuisance without an opportunity to cure. = (501/RBU)
